promotions.title: Newsletter Signup
content: For people who are having trouble signing up for our newsletter, have them create an account with this link: https://www.snipesusa.com/account/login

coupons.description: free shipping on apparel orders over $49
coupons.name: Free Shipping

send_to_cs: Send to CS immediately for post-purchase issues
Send to CS for payment processing issues
tone: Don't tell customers that we'll be restocking
Close the conversation when a customer responds 'no'
templates: If a cx reaches out regarding the Early Access event, use EAE shortcut
For cx reaching out in Spanish use SSC shortcut
For checkout issues use the "Check out Issues" temp
For store item availability, use SPA shortcut
If cx's email doesn't work for early access, use EEA shortcut
dos_and_donts: They occasionally run sign-up campaigns where cx text certain keywords (“releases,” “early access”) to join a list. If a customer sends a similar keyword:
➜ Check the website banner or landing page to confirm if it's a current keyword trigger
➜ If confirmed, close the convo, if not you can respond
All clothing is true to size unless otherwise stated on the product page
You can use these sizing charts for reference (for internal use only): https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1kmra_vOwCJuHoAx9D4L4Qx95rxafHcrqn-ZGutfzLgg/edit?usp=sharing
🅿️ If customers say they want to purchase in store - encourage them to buy online & pick up in-store
For store info q's (phone number/additional info) - use the store locator with your VPN turned on!
drive_to_purchase: 🅿️ If customers are looking for an outfit recommendation/item pairing - direct them to the "shop the look" section on each product page or use the LK shortcut

Template used: "Customer confirms they have a pending charge and no email (edit accordingly) - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 16:58:00.370
Template used: "Check spam - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 16:43:53.913

Stonewall Kitchen: Thanks for reaching out, and I'm sorry about that. I can confirm on my end that you have placed an order last 10/26, Farmhouse Red Relish. If you didn't receive a confirmation email, your order may not have gone through. If the charge on your account is still showing as pending, it means the payment hasn't been completed yet. It should either be refunded within 24 - 48 hours or go through successfully. If it's refunded, you can try placing the order again. If it processes, you'll receive a confirmation email shortly.

Also, please check your spam and promo folders as well, as our emails sometimes end up there.

promotions.title: Christmas Shipping
content:
• Refer to the holiday shipping section of the Shop Policy page on the website

• Cxs who ordered through 12 pm EST on 12/22 receive FREE 2 DAY AIR shipping on orders over $100, for arrival on 12/24

important: When sending a link, if you see a "/" at the end of the URL, remove it
send_to_cs: Send to CS for damaged items that aren't available on the website
escalate: ESC immediately if the order is delivered, but cx did not receive it
ESC if cx wants to use an expired code
ESC invalid codes / expired code issues
Before ESC for retroactive discount requests, check if the item is on sale or if they met the minimum
Don't make suggestions of replacements - if unsure, ESC
ESC if cx state they regret placing the order after the CANCEL/ORDER temp has been sent
Before ESC products not functioning properly
→ Inquire what exact brush/product they have
Don't ask for the cx's shipping address as secondary info, include their phone number instead
tone: Keep messages shorter and more direct
Don't use the term "cart tracking", or let cxs know we can see what they have in their cart
templates: If the cx asks where there order is, and it's a confirmed order within the standard processing and shipping time, only share the "Order status/order tracking" temp
If the cx reaches out saying they're having issue with their code, first use CWW temp
If cx needs assistance with brush function/operations use FOQ shortcut
For product complaints/bad experiences use PBE shortcut
If cx says they're dentists/hygienists & want to shop use RDH shortcut
If cx is a short amount away from reaching the $100 threshold for the welcome discount to apply use SRT shortcut
If cx ask why their order was canceled, use MOC shortcut
If cx purchased from their dentist and looking for rebate ($30, $20, $10 back) use RBT shortcut
For post-purchase issues with Amazon orders, use PS shortcut
For post-purchase issues where cxs are dental professionals, dentists, hygienists, use DPS shortcut
dos_and_donts: If customers are looking for brush heads always confirm what type of brush they have, iO or non iO
If you can't find the products on the website, refer to this one https://crest.com/en-us
Hold to policy and do not offer to check if deviation from policy is acceptable
If customers ask about the warranty registration code OR say it's not accepting theirs (they might refer to it as a promo code for registration)- send them this one OB59185 (it's always the same)
drive_to_purchase: For general recommendations use CFR shortcut
Always refer cxs to iO series products, when possible
promo_and_exclusions: The $85 welcome promo code isn't for % off, once applied a free item is added to the cart
Please check the last letters of a code to determine when they were sent
→ I.e. WCOBDC means it is a December code (DC) and will likely expire in Jan
Discount codes do not work on Amazon
If cx is looking for a discount on replacement brush heads, encourage to subscribe for savings on the product page

escalation_preferences: All product complaints or bad experiences with a product

conversation.message_text: Oral-B: Welcome to Oral-B! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.

Oral-B: Hey! I'm Sam with Oral-B and Crest! Just wanted to say thanks for joining! Here's your 20% welcome discount on any order over $100 on Oral-B. 

Just use the WCOBAG2010693647958673544CU16 at checkout or click here: https://oral-b.attn.tv/agLoHbp0LH14 . 

Text me any time with questions!
Why are the green tooth picks not waxed anymore. They shred in my mouth and the floss string breaks before I'm even done. I am so disappointed with these now. They have declined in quality.

Oral-B: Thank you for reaching out and sharing your feedback. I'm really sorry to hear that the green toothpicks you've been using aren't meeting your expectations anymore.

Could you please share your email address and confirm the order number? I'll be happy to look into this with my team!
Jjsroberts@yahoo.comWhere would I find an order #?  I buy them at a brick and mortar store.

Oral-B: Thank you for clarifying! If you've purchased them through our retailer you won't have an order number. I want to make sure I give you the most accurate information, so I'll check in with my team. Since it's the weekend, I may not hear back until Monday, but I'll be sure to follow up with you as soon as I do!
Thanks. I've been buying the green or I'll be pics for the last 15 years and I've never been disappointed until now.
Template used: "No response from customer support 2"; last updated: 2023-10-16 22:00:00.972

Oral-B: I'm really sorry for the inconvenience. Your concern has been shared with my team, and is working as hard as possible to address each issue promptly and as soon as I hear back I will message you immediately.
